selection_policy.default_instruction: When the user asks what to work on, consult rank 1 first and state the assumption before acting.
selection_policy.when_user_asks_whats_next: Summarize the top ranked item plus any active editorial blockers or data-hardening warnings.
selection_policy.when_user_says_go: Proceed with rank 1 unless the user has named a different mode, track, bundle, or priority.

notes: Roadmap remains narrative context; this file is the operational dispatcher.
37 surveillance track(s) are hidden from ordinary rotation until their cooldown expires.

work_items.title: Repair coverage for Rapalogs
work_items.rationale: Run a bounded coverage-repair pass for Rapalogs before ordinary surveillance. The repair should assemble source, study, finding, support-map, registry, limiting-evidence, safety, recent-review, preclinical-anchor, and taxonomy-boundary records sufficient to audit the moderate human_biomarker_signal public outlook without overstating biomarker, immune, dermatologic, or short-term feasibility signals as durable functional aging benefit.
work_items.default_action: Run a coverage-repair pass against the latest assessment gaps; update public records only if the repair changes public boundaries.

work_items.title: Backfill coverage assessment for Senolytics
work_items.rationale: 18 published baseline track(s) still lack internal coverage assessments; this is the highest-ranked unassessed track in the field-change queue.
work_items.default_action: Review the published outlook, session, staged update, evidence reviews, and public update, then create a coverage assessment without changing public records.
